title: Handyman
description:
Work Location: Raffles Place

Working Hours: 8am-5pm, 8:30am-5:30pm

Working Days: Mon - Fri


Job Summary:

· Appropriate attired using Sodexo dress code (Supplied by Sodexo)

· Perform routine handyman tasks such as light maintenance, air-conditioning upkeep, and other general repair work as needed.

· Assist with periodic handyman tasks such as cleaning air-conditioning grilles scheduled by the site lead).

· Support the maintenance team when it is required (light fixtures, plumbing, Mechanical, Electrical and any other Building Equipment)

· Execute any other jobs as may be instructed by the Site Lead


Key Result Areas

· Prioritize tasks so that the most important work gets accomplished.

· Maintain a neat and tidy workspace and meeting Client’s expectation

· Proactive in looking for value-add opportunities

· Keep Site Lead informed of any issues, incidents and any other matters that needs attention

· A good team player

Knowledge, Skill and Abilities Required

· Preferred Secondary Education or ITE Certicate

· 2 years working experience

· Able to speak and understand simple English.

· Able to work independently and interact well with people of all levels.

· Those who have worked in hospitality before will have an added advantage

· You must be pleasant and possess a friendly personality

· Excellent communication skills.

· Able to work independently with minimal supervision.

postedCompany.description:
Sodexo in Singapore

 

Sodexo Singapore was established in 1982 and presently provides On-site Service Solutions to reputable and prestigious organisations.


We have a strong presence in Corporate, Education, Defence, Seniors, Remote Sites and Offshore client segments and are well positioned to support the various businesses in the evaluation of the best possible methods of providing safe, productive and economically feasible food and facilities management service solutions to our clients.


With the support of our international network, as well as our strong presence and experience in the Asia Pacific region, Sodexo Singapore is a leading provider of On-site Service Solutions in Singapore.

 

Industy: Facilities Management Service/ Food Service/ Remote Sites (Offshore)

 

History

Sodexo designs, manages and delivers a full range of Comprehensive service solutions so that you can focus fully on what you do best.

 

Sodexo Singapore has more than 20 years of experience in Corporate, Education, Defence, Seniors and Remote Site client segments, see how we can support you today!
postedCompany.name: SODEXO SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
